response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform leadership; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or C++-centric distributed systems work, despite some early C++ exposure in academic projects.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains and languages
Demonstrated open-source leadership and mentoring through workshops and tools
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, AI-agent infra)
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ experience (academic/early career), far below 8-year minimum
No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or large-scale distributed systems design
Lacks documented experience in mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or establishing architectural standards
